panels.title: CPU usage by state over time
Raptorcast recv errors + peer disc timeouts /sec
VDP-tagged metrics
panels.description: Number of monad_* metric series carrying secp_key label. Non-zero = VDP push is configured. See docs/vdp-otel-push.md

panels.title: Validator secp_key
panels.description: Public secp identifier MF uses to tag metrics from this validator. Empty = VDP not configured.

panels.title: Network
panels.description: Monad network (auto-detected from chain_id at install time). Maps Prometheus external_label 'network' to a colored badge: testnet=green, mainnet=orange.
